blocks.text: Glimt conquer Sporting. Now the title race weekend roars.

Bodo/Glimt's 3-0 demolition of Sporting CP is Norwegian football's finest European night in years. Meanwhile Hovland sits T14 at TPC Sawgrass — five shots off Schauffele's lead with one round to play.

blocks.label: ⚽ Premier League Saturday — Arsenal lead, City chasing
items: Arsenal vs Everton 18:30 — Gunners 7pts clear at top, protect the gap ★
Chelsea vs Newcastle 18:30 — top-four dogfight, Chelsea 5th on 48pts ★
Man City vs West Ham 21:00 — City must close 7pt deficit on Arsenal ★

blocks.label: ⚽ La Liga — Title race Saturday & Sunday
items: Atlético Madrid vs Getafe Sat 16:15 — Atleti push for championship position ★
Real Madrid vs Elche Sat 21:00 — Bernabéu, Madrid's title ambitions on the line ★
Barcelona vs Sevilla Sun 16:15 — Barça at Camp Nou, must-win in the race ★

blocks.text: 🚴 Mon 12:40 — Tirreno-Adriatico opens: Leknessund and Wærenskjold carry Norway's spring hopes
